# Version 4.151.0
> **Skia m151 and performance gains** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.151.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 upgrades to Skia m151 and ships a wave of managed-code performance optimizations. Multiple hot-path operations — SKColor conversions, HarfBuzz buffer encoding, SKShaper glyph reading, and hex parsing — are ported to allocation-free managed code. WASM support expands to Emscripten 5.0.6 and .NET 11 with new exception-handling support.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia upgraded to milestone m151** — The bundled Skia engine is now built from chrome/m151, bringing upstream rendering bug fixes and performance improvements across all platforms. ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294), [#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382), [#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443), [#4489](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4489))
- **CPU raster regression restored** — SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT is re-enabled to fix a CPU raster rendering regression introduced in an upstream sync. ([#4428](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4428))

## API Surface

- **SKColor and SKColorF conversions ported to managed code** — SKColor-to-SKColorF conversion and SKPMColor single-value premultiply/unpremultiply are now pure managed integer math, eliminating P/Invoke round-trips on every conversion. ([#4370](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4370), [#4385](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4385))
- **SKColor hex parsing optimized with ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads** — The hex color parsing path is rewritten for zero-allocation span-based input, and new ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads are added for consumers who already have sliced strings. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **GRContextOptions unsafe modifier removed** — The unnecessary unsafe modifier is removed from GRContextOptions, making the type usable in safe contexts without opting in to unsafe. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed** — SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) was leaking a native image handle when the subset crop failed; the handle is now correctly released. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **HarfBuzzSharp Buffer.AddUtf8 is now allocation-free** — HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8(string) now uses a pooled UTF-8 encode path instead of allocating a byte array on every call, cutting allocations in text shaping loops. ([#4376](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4376))
- **Tag.Parse and SKFourByteTag.Parse no longer allocate per call** — HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse and SKFourByteTag.Parse each previously allocated a char[4] on every invocation; both now use stack-allocated spans. ([#4408](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4408), [#4396](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4396))
- **SKShaper glyph results read via zero-copy spans** — SKShaper now reads glyph and position arrays from native memory via ReadOnlySpan without copying into managed arrays, reducing allocations in the shaping hot path. ([#4388](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4388))

## Platform

- **WASM updated to Emscripten 5.0.6 with .NET 11 exception handling** — WebAssembly native libraries are rebuilt with Emscripten 5.0.6, enabling the new exnref-based exception-handling model required by .NET 11 WASM. A preview-.NET WASM CI job is added to catch exception-handling regressions early. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4487](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4487), [#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459), [#4488](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4488))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1 ships with this release, updated with allocation-free UTF-8 buffer encoding and stack-allocated tag parsing from the performance work in this cycle.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

## Release Candidate 1 (July 21, 2026)

Release Candidate 1 landed the Skia m151 upstream sync, the CPU raster regression fix, the SKImage resource leak fix, WASM Emscripten 5.0.6 support, and the SKColor/SKPMColor managed conversion ports.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.151.0-preview.2.1...v4.151.0-rc.1.1)

## Preview 2 (July 14, 2026)

Preview 2 delivered the HarfBuzz allocation-free AddUtf8 path, Tag.Parse and SKFourByteTag.Parse stack-span rewrites, zero-copy SKShaper glyph spans, SKColor hex parsing optimizations, and the GRContextOptions cleanup.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.151.0-preview.1.1...v4.151.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 opened the 4.151 line with the initial Skia m151 milestone upgrade and a Skia submodule WASM build fix.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.1...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
